_note: THE IMAGE CANON — a REFERENCE-ONLY index. The visual twin of canon.ts. It NEVER holds copies of images: every entry points at the canonical on-disk path of the one best image per subject, mapped to the QBE areas it serves. Single source per image. dataClass mirrors canon.ts (green = public-safe, red = consent-gated). type: photo | illustration | chart | logo. Canonical store policy: web images live under v2/public/images/** (served at /images/**); the .pen deck mirrors a subset in design/deck-assets/ because Pencil image fills need a file path relative to the .pen (tolerated deck mirror, not a second source of truth). generated-images/ is AI scratch, never canonical. Edit here first. Replaces the earlier design/canon-images/ folder, which was deleted because it duplicated files.

policy.deckMirror: design/deck-assets (Pencil needs path-relative assets; mirror, not a source)
policy.rule: reference a canonical path; never copy an image to make a set
